---
title: "Correlation Analysis"
output: html_notebook
---
```{r}
#Read objects
physeq_mithun.aitchison <- read_rds("physeq_mithun.aitchison.rds")
diet.physeq.aitchison   <- read_rds("diet.physeq.aitchison.rds")
```

```{r Figure 5}
library(phyloseq)
library(vegan)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpubr)
library(ape)


# Confirm sample names in diet object
sample_names(diet.physeq.aitchison) <- str_replace(
  sample_names(diet.physeq.aitchison),
  "sample\\.(\\d+)M(\\d+)",
  "sampleM\\1.\\2"
)

# Match samples
matching_samples <- intersect(
  sample_names(diet.physeq.aitchison),
  sample_names(physeq_mithun.aitchison)
)

diet.physeq.matched   <- prune_samples(matching_samples, diet.physeq.aitchison)
mithun.physeq.matched <- prune_samples(matching_samples, physeq_mithun.aitchison)

# Extract CLR data (taxa rows, samples columns)
otu_diet   <- as.data.frame(otu_table(diet.physeq.matched))
if (!taxa_are_rows(diet.physeq.matched)) otu_diet <- t(otu_diet)

otu_mithun <- as.data.frame(otu_table(mithun.physeq.matched))
if (!taxa_are_rows(mithun.physeq.matched)) otu_mithun <- t(otu_mithun)

# Aitchison distances (Euclidean on CLR)
distance_diet   <- vegdist(t(otu_diet),   method = "euclidean")
distance_mithun <- vegdist(t(otu_mithun), method = "euclidean")

# Mantel
mantel_result <- mantel(distance_diet, distance_mithun,
                        method = "spearman", permutations = 999)
print(mantel_result)

# Distance–distance plot
diet_long   <- as.data.frame(as.table(as.matrix(distance_diet)))
mithun_long <- as.data.frame(as.table(as.matrix(distance_mithun)))

distance_df <- merge(diet_long, mithun_long,
                     by = c("Var1", "Var2"),
                     suffixes = c("_Diet", "_Mithun"))

distance_df_filtered <- distance_df %>%
  filter(!(Freq_Diet == 0 & Freq_Mithun == 0))

ggplot(distance_df_filtered, aes(x = Freq_Diet, y = Freq_Mithun)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "red", se = FALSE) +
  labs(x = "Diet Aitchison distance",
       y = "Microbiome Aitchison distance") +
  theme_pubr()


# Procrustes / protest on PCoA scores
p1 <- ape::pcoa(distance_mithun)
p2 <- ape::pcoa(distance_diet)

k <- 2
scr1 <- p1$vectors[, 1:k, drop = FALSE]
scr2 <- p2$vectors[, 1:k, drop = FALSE]

proc_test <- protest(scr1, scr2, permutations = 999)
print(proc_test)


```
